_comment: These are the NEW dependencies to add to your existing package.json.
_note_vercel_node: @vercel/node provides types for Vercel serverless functions (VercelRequest, VercelResponse). It is a devDependency — not shipped to the browser.
_note_zod: Zod is used for form validation in src/lib/validation.ts. It is a runtime dependency but tree-shaken heavily — only imported schemas are bundled.
